name: projects
description: Complementary project knowledge for Hypefast PM work — domain/platform context consumed alongside the pm-workflow skills in hypefast-arbi/product-knowledge.

plugins.name: odoo-knowledge
plugins.description: Odoo functional knowledge across Essentials, Finance, HR, Productivity, Sales, Services, and Supply Chain modules.

plugins.name: product-skills
plugins.description: Odoo-specific requirement skills: module mapping, Odoo-native acceptance criteria, and standard-vs-custom classification for PRD requirement tables.

plugins.name: hypefast-workspace
plugins.description: Hypefast account template: concrete Atlassian cloudId/site, Confluence spaces, Jira projects/boards, PRD-template source, and known people for the hypefast-it workspace. Consumed by the pm-workflow skills so they skip runtime discovery on this account.
